title: Annual re-validation pass (electrical units re-checked by SME)
context: Safety guidance evolves as official standards, codes, and agency guidance are updated. All content units carry a lastReviewed date; units that have not been reviewed within the re-review cadence defined in ops-019 are flagged as stale. Electrical triage units (riskClass=high) must be re-validated by the credentialed electrical SME annually or sooner on material guidance change. This recurring maintenance task documents the annual re-validation pass, updates lastReviewed dates, and records any content updates triggered by changed guidance.
objective: Conduct the annual re-validation pass: check all content units against current guidance, re-validate electrical triage units with the credentialed SME, update lastReviewed dates and content versions where needed, and commit a re-validation report.
acceptanceCriteria: All content units are checked against current official guidance and cited sources; units where guidance has materially changed are updated and re-reviewed by an approver distinct from the author
Electrical triage units (riskClass=high) are re-validated by the confirmed credentialed electrical SME; the SME's re-validation sign-off (with date and logRef) is recorded in the review log
lastReviewed dates are updated in the schema for all re-validated units; contentVersion is incremented for any unit whose content changed
A re-validation report is committed to the repo recording: units reviewed, any content changes made, the SME sign-off for electrical units, and the date of the pass
The print bundle version and date are updated if any content changed; the CI content-governance gate passes for all updated units
output: A committed re-validation report with updated lastReviewed dates, any content revisions with distinct approver sign-off, and electrical SME re-validation record; CI passes on all updated units.
